name: Knock
description: Monitor Knock notification infrastructure for workflow access and data handling compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Knock at https://dashboard.knock.app
2. Go to Settings → API Keys
3. Copy your Secret API Key (sk_...)
4. Enter it below

credentialFields.label: Secret API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Knock Settings → API Keys. Use the Secret Key (sk_...)
